data.title: Clean-up and improve array editing in inspector.
Implement BPM support in AudioStream files.
Fix FileInfo::import_valid always being set to false for TextFile in some cases
Enhance filesystem dock tooltips
[4.x] Allow extending MultiplayerPeerExtension from GDScript
Print expected `os.arch` tuple for current platform in GDExtension error
Disable plugin for conversion of foreign Sprite2D to different types
Disable polygon editing on foreign resources
Disable navmesh, lightmap, and VoxelGI generation on foreign data
Reselect the timing of `first_draw`
Revert script resource on discard unsaved changes
Add read-only mode to AnimationEditor for foreign resources.
Fix selection list in 2D editor
Address slow copy performance when using the `FileAccessFilesystemJAndroid` implementation
Fix incorrect expression base in `AnimationNodeStateMachinePlayback::_check_advance_condition`
send FLAGS_TRANSPOSE_RECT to Vulkan
GDExtension: Remove extraneous dependency getter and fix export error
Add threshold argument to is_pixel_opaque()
Relative paths to GDExtension libraries are "out-of-project" when exporting
Renaming or creating a `TextFile` outside Godot temporarily gives it a bad icon (Also happens with `export_presets.cfg`)
GDExtension export error message sounds like it requires every feature flag to be part of the library name
Rename OSX to macOS and iPhoneOS to iOS.
Load/update GDScript from disk on load if cache mode is CACHE_MODE_IGNORE
Vulkan: GPU validation errors
